text: What is the primary reason for positioning a dedicated standby person immediately outside an enclosed space while work is occurring inside?

options.text: To assist with tool cleaning on deck
To initiate and get the emergency rescue plan underway immediately if a hazard develops inside
To keep a record of time for payroll purposes
To handle communication with shore commercial agents

explanation: A standby person is essential for confined space entry to monitor the conditions inside, communicate with the team, and provide immediate notification or assistance if an emergency occurs, as they are the vital link for rescue initiation.
